2604.09338.title: Mind the Gap Between Spatial Reasoning and Acting! Step-by-Step Evaluation of Agents With Spatial-Gym
2604.09338.paper_summary: Spatial reasoning is central to navigation and robotics, yet measuring model capabilities on these tasks remains difficult. Existing benchmarks evaluate models in a one-shot setting, requiring full solution generation in a single response, unlike humans, who work in interactive environments step-by-step. We introduce Spatial-Gym, a Gymnasium environment that isolates spatial constraint reasoning by testing pathfinding in 2D-grid puzzles as a sequential decision task with optional backtracking. We evaluate eight models in three settings (one-shot, step-by-step, step-by-step with backtracking) against human, random, and A* baselines on 500 episodes. The best model, GPT-OSS 120B, achieves a solve rate of 16.0%, 82 points below the human baseline (98.0%). Step-by-step format helps weaker models (up to +5.4%) by removing formatting errors, but hurts stronger models (up to 5.6%) by constraining global planning. Backtracking improves episode completion, but increases solve rate only for weaker models; stronger models rarely backtrack and do not benefit from it. Our experiments have three key findings: (1) models fail to scale reasoning effort with difficulty, (2) vision models receiving images of the spatial environment reduce solve rate by 73%, and (3) extended chain-of-thought reasoning retains a 3-5x accuracy advantage over standard inference even in the step-by-step setting. Spatial-Gym enables diagnosis of model limitations and provides a framework for improving spatial reasoning through reinforcement learning.
2604.09338.paper_summary_zh: 空間推理對於導航和機器人技術至關重要，但在這些任務上測量模型能力仍然困難。現有基準在一次性設置中評估模型，要求在單次回應中生成完整解決方案，這與人類在互動環境中逐步工作的方式不同。我們引入了Spatial-Gym，一個Gymnasium環境，通過測試2D網格謎題中的路徑尋找，將空間約束推理隔離為一個具有可選回溯的序列決策任務。我們在三種設置（一次性、逐步、逐步帶回溯）中評估了八個模型，並在500個回合中與人類、隨機和A*基準進行比較。最佳模型GPT-OSS 120B的解決率為16.0%，比人類基準（98.0%）低82點。逐步格式通過消除格式錯誤幫助較弱的模型（提高最多5.4%），但對較強的模型造成損害（降低最多5.6%），因為這限制了全局規劃。回溯提高了回合完成率，但僅對較弱的模型提高了解決率；較強的模型很少回溯，並未從中受益。我們的實驗有三個主要發現：（1）模型未能根據難度調整推理努力，（2）接收空間環境圖像的視覺模型降低了解決率73%，以及（3）擴展的思考鏈推理在逐步設置中仍然保留了3-5倍的準確性優勢。Spatial-Gym使得診斷模型的局限性成為可能，並提供了一個通過強化學習改善空間推理的框架。
2604.09338.author: Lars Benedikt Kaesberg et.al.
2604.09338.authors: Lars Benedikt Kaesberg, Tianyu Yang, Niklas Bauer, Terry Ruas, Jan Philip Wahle, Bela Gipp
